news.summary: Classic Vacations ®, based in San Jose, California, has recently launched a major digital upgrade on June 4, 2025. This enhancement enables travel advisors to create complete trip itineraries online. The new system allows for seamless booking of premium services offered by Classic Vacations ®. This online platform streamlines the trip planning process and provides access to a wide range of services. Travel advisors now have the capability to build entire itineraries online, enhancing the overall booking experience.
news.headline: Classic Vacations® now offers online booking for flights and car rentals, enhancing trip planning with their premium service.

news.summary: Newly opened DeCicco & Sons Market in Sleepy Hollow, NY has announced the sales launch for One Kingsland, the final phase of Edge-on-Hudson development. The townhomes offer park and river views, attracting prospective homebuyers. The announcement was made on June 4, 2025. This development is set to bring in a new wave of residents to the area.
news.headline: One Kingsland townhomes debut at Edge-on-Hudson in Sleepy Hollow, NY. Sales launch announced for final phase.

news.summary: A recent report by 360Quadrants on Loitering Munition Startups/SMEs Companies in 2025 from DELRAY BEACH, Florida, highlights top performers in the industry. The assessment identifies leading players, ranging from established global leaders to promising newcomers, for their outstanding performance in market positioning and product development. This recognition underscores the significance of these companies in the sector.
news.headline: 360Quadrants report highlights top Loitering Munition startups & SMEs in 2025. Global giants & innovators recognized.

news.summary: OneCause, a top event and online fundraising solutions provider, has revealed the completion of its second partner cohort's training. The partners can now access premium resources aimed at enhancing their ability to host successful fundraising events. The announcement was made on June 4, 2025, in Indianapolis.
news.headline: OneCause graduates new cohort of partners, providing access to exclusive training for exceptional fundraising events. - June 4, 2025.

news.summary: Today, ALK (ALKB:DC / OMX: ALK B) disclosed its attendance at the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference 2025 in New York City from June 3 to June 5, 2025.
news.headline: ALK to attend Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference 2025 in New York from 3-5 June. ALKB:DC / OMX: ALK B.

news.summary: Sticky Password has enhanced its Dark Web Monitoring service by introducing Breach Monitoring, which provides users with prompt notifications about security breaches related to the online services they utilize. This update allows users to receive alerts quickly, sometimes even before the impacted company officially acknowledges the breach. By offering this new feature, users are empowered to take necessary actions proactively in response to security incidents.
news.headline: Sticky Password now offers Breach Monitoring to Dark Web service, alerts users of security incidents before affected companies.

news.summary: Join us for a complimentary webinar where we delve into the utilization of de-identified data from an Electronic Health Record (EHR) at a prominent academic medical center to bolster real-world data research. Participants will gain insight into the distinctions between structured and unstructured data and their respective roles in this process. Learn more about this innovative approach by signing up now!
news.headline: Webinar by Xtalks discusses using de-identified EHR data from a major academic medical center for real-world research.

news.summary: In an upcoming complimentary online seminar, participants will discover effective ways to create robust connections with patient advocacy organizations and tailor educational resources for various patient demographics and care systems. The webinar aims to provide valuable tactics for offering continuous assistance that minimizes the workload for participants.
news.headline: Free webinar by Xtalks on educating and supporting patient networks in rare diseases, oncology, and clinical trials.

news.summary: Clear Labs has launched a new automated NGS assay designed to identify bacteria and fungi from sterile site samples. The assay delivers results within one day and requires minimal hands-on time. This innovation comes from Clear Labs, a prominent player in the field of fully automated next-generation sequencing. The announcement was made in San Carlos, California on June 4, 2025.
news.headline: Clear Labs launches new automated NGS platform for bacterial and fungal detection from sterile sites with next-day results.

news.summary: MCIM Labs has launched a new feature that provides predictive alerts specific to equipment to detect and address potential asset risks preemptively, minimizing downtime. This innovation was revealed by Fulcrum Collaborations, the top player in data center operations software, in Cannes, France, on June 4, 2025. This advancement aims to enhance operational efficiency by leveraging advanced technology to anticipate and mitigate potential issues before they affect uptime, ultimately improving overall performance.
news.headline: Fulcrum introduces intelligent bulletins for data center operators to proactively manage risks. Cannes, France, June 4, 2025.

news.summary: The opening of the initial Ritz-Carlton Reserve in Central and South America signifies a significant achievement for The Athens Group and its expanding array of hospitality properties. On June 4, 2025, in Phoenix, the renowned luxury hospitality developer shared the news.
news.headline: The Athens Group introduces Nekajui, a Ritz-Carlton Reserve, the first in Central and South America. Marks a strategic milestone in hospitality assets.

news.summary: The DO Rías Baixas wine region in Spain is kicking off the Summer of Albariño with a roadshow in three cities, showcasing a total of twenty-six wineries. This event is set to take place during the initial week of June and marks the start of a vibrant Summer of Albariño initiative. Apart from the roadshow, the campaign will involve collaboration across various platforms...
news.headline: DO Rías Baixas launches Summer of Albariño with three-city roadshow in Atlanta, Dallas, and Houston, featuring 26 wineries.

news.summary: Velosio's recent acquisition of Strava Technology Group, a Microsoft Partner renowned for its expertise in Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement and Power Platform, marks a pivotal step in boosting Velosio's customer engagement abilities within the Microsoft Cloud. This strategic decision aims to capitalize on Strava's specialized knowledge, ultimately fortifying Velosio's position in the market. The move underscores Velosio's commitment to expanding its offerings and fostering stronger relationships with clients.
news.headline: Velosio acquires Strava Technology Group, boosting customer engagement offerings in Microsoft Cloud with Dynamics 365 expertise.

news.summary: Bellawood Farm, located in Canal Winchester, Ohio, is set to unveil its grand opening celebration on Saturday, June 14. Spanning across 82 acres, this historic farm has been revitalized under the guidance of three Marine veterans and their families. The transformation aims to create a community-centered space.
news.headline: Bellawood Farm in Ohio to hold grand opening on June 14, 2025. 82-acre property revived by 3 Marine veterans.

news.summary: Today in Atlanta, on June 4, 2025, Instant Financial, a fintech company known for modernizing payments and earned wage access (EWA) for hourly workers, has strengthened its reputation as a pioneer in the field. The company, which prides itself on financial wellness initiatives, has been recognized as a finalist for its innovative work. This acknowledgment further solidifies Instant Financial's position as a leader in the industry, catering to the needs of the hourly workforce.
news.headline: Instant Financial is a finalist for the 2025 PayTech Awards in EWA category, recognizing their innovative work in financial wellness.

news.summary: A recent study has discovered a concerning number of vulnerabilities present in diverse cloud environments, highlighting the crucial importance of implementing open source security practices. Prowler, a key player in open cloud security, unveiled its first-ever State of Cloud Security Report in San Francisco on June 4, 2025. This report sheds light on the widespread vulnerabilities observed in various cloud setups, emphasizing the necessity of robust security measures to safeguard digital assets.
news.headline: Prowler's report shows increasing cloud vulnerabilities due to complexity, emphasizing need for open source security.

news.summary: Celebrating its 15th anniversary, You Squared Media, a full-service advertising agency based in Houston, Texas, has seen immense success through strategic decisions, strong partnerships, and impactful campaigns. With 15 years of experience, the agency has solidified a reputation for creative excellence and steady growth.
news.headline: You Squared Media marking its 15th year with innovative marketing and successful campaigns in Houston, Texas.
BoC's Senior Dep. Gov. Rogers: The recent strengthening of CAD has had some effect on inflation.

news.summary: A prominent transportation management platform, FreightPOP, has introduced a robust route optimization tool that aims to eradicate unnecessary miles, cut down on freight expenses, and enhance the efficiency of multimodal shipping. The advanced AI-powered feature enables shippers to make quicker and more intelligent decisions, potentially saving significant amounts of money and time.
news.headline: FreightPOP introduces AI-driven route optimization tool to reduce costs and streamline shipping logistics.

news.summary: A renowned author and wellness influencer has teamed up with MYOS to endorse Fortetropin®, the company's exclusive nutritional component that aids in muscle development and maintenance at all life stages. The collaboration was announced in Cedar Knolls, N.J., on June 4, 2025. MYOS CORP, a key player in the industry, is dedicated to promoting healthy living through its innovative products.
news.headline: MYOS CORP partners with JJ Virgin to promote Fortetropin® for muscle health. Supports growth and retention.

news.summary: IMC Construction has joined forces with Greystar, a prominent real estate company, to construct their inaugural residential projects in the Greater Philadelphia area: Great Valley Apartments and Album Great Valley. Situated in East Whiteland Township, these developments are set to introduce over 400 new housing units to the region.
news.headline: IMC Construction and Greystar collaborate to build 400+ new housing units in Philadelphia suburbs.

news.summary: Embry-Riddle Aeronautical University has introduced a groundbreaking Associate of Science in Air Traffic Management program aimed at expediting the employment process for aspiring air traffic controllers. The program is scheduled to commence in August 2025 and offers students an innovative pathway towards this career.
news.headline: Embry-Riddle introduces Air Traffic Management associate's degree program to help train air traffic controllers faster. Program set to start in August 2025.

news.summary: CEO Autumn-Kyoko Cushman from ShiftRx recently appeared on Disruption Interruption to discuss the impact of AI in addressing the projected U.S. healthcare provider shortage, set to reach 87,150 by 2037. ShiftRx's platform automates administrative responsibilities, increases clinician salaries by as much as 40%, and enhances the emphasis on patient care. The company is based in TAMPA BAY, Fla.
news.headline: AK Cushman uses AI to address U.S. healthcare provider shortage, boosting clinician pay by up to 40%. Proj. to hit 87,150 by 2037.

news.summary: HostPapa, Inc. has taken a major step forward in its development as a comprehensive customer-focused solutions provider with the acquisition of CloudBlue's cloud monetization technology. The partnership between CloudBlue and Hostopia, HostPapa's Partner Platform, marks a significant advancement for the company. The transaction was sealed in Burlington, ON, on June 4, 2025. This move underscores HostPapa's commitment to enhancing its offerings and expanding its services to meet the evolving needs of its clientele.
news.headline: HostPapa acquires CloudBlue from Ingram Micro, advancing into a full-service platform. Burlington, June 4, 2025.
Consensys CEO: Ethereum is expected to become the backbone of global finance, surpassing Bitcoin

news.summary: In Tampa, Rentvine recently held its first Be Herd User Conference, bringing together approximately 300 professionals in property management. The event aimed to shape the future of the platform and introduced attendees to new functionalities, emphasized user-driven advancements, and announced Rentvine's acquisition of Bynnd to enhance its accounting capabilities. The conference took place in ESTERO, Fla., in June.
news.headline: Rentvine unveils product roadmap at Be Herd conference in Tampa, attended by 300 pros. Announces acquisition of Bynnd.

news.summary: The services sector in the U.S., which is crucial for the economy, surprisingly did not show any growth in May. Cost pressures surged to their highest level in over three years, sparking concerns that trade tensions and tariffs are fueling a stagflationary environment. The Institute for Supply Management's Services Purchasing Managers Index decreased to 49.9% in May from 51.6% in April, falling short of the expected 52%. This drop marked the first slight decline in services activity since June 2024. Out of the past 60 months dating back to June 2020, the ISM Services PMI has only contracted in four instances. New orders experienced a significant decline to 46.4%, down by 5.9 percentage points from the previous month, while business activity remained stagnant at 50%, a notable decrease from April's 53.7%. Employment saw a slight improvement at 50.7% after two months of contraction. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: US services sector stagnates in May as cost pressures surge to Nov. 2022 highs. ISM Services PMI drops to 49.9%, missing consensus of 52%.

This development offers PSALM Capital clients a chance to broaden their investment portfolio with a high-profile sports asset. The collaboration signifies a remarkable opportunity for investors to tap into the lucrative sports market.

news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have incurred losses surpassing $100,000 in Iovance between May 9, 2024, and May 8, 2025, to reach out to him for a discussion about their potential courses of action. If you meet these criteria and are interested in exploring your options...
news.headline: Investor alert: Faruqi & Faruqi investigates claims for Iovance Biotherapeutics investors with losses exceeding $100,000. Contact James Wilson.

news.summary: Investors who incurred losses greater than $100,000 in Ibotta are encouraged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson to reach out to him personally to explore potential courses of action. If you bought or acquired Ibotta stock tied to a specific period, you may be eligible.
news.headline: Investors of Ibotta experiencing losses over $100,000 urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.

news.summary: Bastion Fiduciary introduced their inaugural actively managed Exchange Traded Fund named Bastion Energy ETF (CBOE: BESF) on June 4, 2025, in Islamorada, Florida. The ETF aims for long-term capital growth by utilizing a concentrated value-based strategy.
news.headline: Bastion Fiduciary launches new energy ETF, Bastion Energy ETF (CBOE: BESF), on June 4, 2025 for long-term capital growth.

news.summary: On June 4, 2025, Aembit, a company specializing in workload identity and access management (IAM), was revealed to be one of the top 30 cybersecurity startups influencing the industry. This recognition came with the launch of Rising in Cyber 2025, an exclusive list curated by Notable Capital. This acknowledgment highlights the innovative strides made by Aembit in the cybersecurity sector.
news.headline: Aembit, a workload IAM company, listed in Rising in Cyber 2025, a notable list of top 30 cybersecurity startups.
